overall_justification: While the edition doesn't explicitly discuss the "Caixa de Conversão" mechanics (conversion rate, etc.), its dominant focus is the celebration and support of the "Convênio de Taubaté" and the "valorização do café."  The articles emphasize the "triumpho" and positive outcomes expected from the agreement. Given that the Convênio is intrinsically linked to the creation of the Caixa (e.g., its funding mechanism as described in Article 8), and this edition expresses strong approval of the Convênio, it implicitly leans towards an Expansionist perspective.  This perspective sees the Caixa as a tool to support the coffee valorization scheme and broader economic development, aligning with the celebratory tone of the articles.

supporting_evidence.quote: Ao sr. presidente do Estado fo-ram ainda hontem dirigidos os se-guintes telegrammas solicitando aassinatura do accordo preferido no Convênio do Taubaté:
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This sets the tone for the edition's focus on the Convênio de Taubaté and its perceived success.

supporting_evidence.quote: A Camara Municipal felicita o benemerito presidente do S. Paulo,... pela ultimo victoria, relativa á valorização do café.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote exemplifies the celebratory and supportive tone towards the coffee valorization scheme, indirectly supporting the Expansionist view of the Caixa as a tool for this policy.

supporting_evidence.quote: Ainda hontem, o sr. dr. Alba Albuquerque Lins, secretario da Fazenda, recebeu em seu gabinete muitos cumprimentos pessoaes, por cartas, cartões e telegrammas, pelo brilhante êxito da sua missão.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This highlights the widespread approval and perceived success of the Taubaté agreement, further reinforcing the implicit Expansionist lean.
